title: Memorandum Order No. 131, s. 1969
text:
Tanggapan ng Pangulo ng Pilipinas (OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES)

MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 131

FURTHER AMENDING MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 107 DATED JULY 12, 1968, REGARDING THE FLAG CEREMONY IN THE OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT.

Memorandum Order No. 107 dated July 12, 1968, as amended, directing the holding of a Flag Ceremony every Monday morning and Friday afternoon in the Office of the President, is hereby further amended so as to reschedule the ceremony on Mondays from 8:45 to 9:00 A.M. sharp, instead of from 7:45 to 8:00 A.M.

By the authority of the President: (Sgd.) ERNESTO M. MACEDA Executive Secretary

Manila, August 7, 1969

Source : Malacañang Records Office
